_comment: Template documenting the JSON Claude returns from /performance-review (introduced 2026-05-26). Owns per-decision A-F grading + per-strategy aggregates + M13 insights cross-check + Tier-3 tweak proposals. Per-decision grades are ALSO appended (keyed by order_package_id) to comms/claude_strategy_scores.jsonl — the durable, trainer-ingestible score log. This file is documentation, not a validated JSON Schema.

strategy_performance._comment: Per-strategy aggregates over the window. One entry per strategy with >=1 decision. shadow strategies show n_filled=0 (no live orders).

trade_decision_grades._comment: One entry per order package decided in the window. REQUIRED; pass [] only when the window contained zero decisions. Each entry is ALSO appended (keyed by order_package_id) to comms/claude_strategy_scores.jsonl. Letter grade is independent of dollar P&L. The three categorical labels (entry_quality, exit_quality, risk_management) are the training-friendly fields.
trade_decision_grades.entry_quality: optimal | acceptable | late | early | should_skip | unknown
trade_decision_grades.exit_quality: optimal | tp_appropriate | sl_appropriate | premature_exit | held_too_long | unknown
trade_decision_grades.risk_management: correct | oversize | undersize | sl_too_tight | sl_too_wide | unknown
trade_decision_grades.rationale: <= 240 chars — why this grade given signal_logic + outcome
trade_decision_grades.alternative_action: <= 160 chars — what we'd do differently next time, or 'none'

insights_review._comment: Cross-check of the M13 AI-analyst cache at runtime_logs/insights/*.json (surfaced via /api/bot/insights/*). One entry per disagreement or staleness note; empty when insights match reality.

proposed_tweaks._comment: Tier-3 parameter / config changes to consider. Operator approves; this skill never edits config. Each tweak must cite specific order_package_ids / trade_ids / sweeps for evidence.

backlog_drain._comment: Result of draining docs/claude/performance-review-backlog.json this run. action: fixed | deferred | invalid.

paper_book_tracker._comment: Diversified paper-book read (config/research/diversified_paper_book.yaml — 10 alt cells on bybit_1 paper). Append a snapshot via scripts/ops/paper_book_tracker.py, then summarize here. Watches the live paper trajectory for alpha-decay vs noise after the 2026-06-18 robustness bank. null only if the cohort pull failed (note in anomalies).
paper_book_tracker.assessment: healthy | noise | decay-watch — <= 160 chars citing the numbers

real_money_allocation_benchmark._comment: RECURRING (§ Real-money allocation benchmark, operator directive 2026-07-15). Does a ready-for-live portfolio improve the live real-money book's risk-adjusted PnL (incl. via regime diversification) vs leaving capital where it is? Analysis + a PROPOSED Tier-3 re-arm only; never flips mode. null (+ anomalies line) only when there's no live real-money book AND no queued candidate.
real_money_allocation_benchmark.candidate: alpaca_live ETF sleeve (paper-proxied via alpaca_paper fills — alpaca_live dry_run does not fill)
real_money_allocation_benchmark.proposed_action: e.g. 'hold shelved' | 'Tier-3 re-arm proposal: mode: live for alpaca_live (evidence: ...)'
real_money_allocation_benchmark.note: <= 240 chars; MUST state the paper-proxy caveat

anomalies: free-form list of notable items (grade drift, unexpected attribution, etc.)

claude_channel_ping._comment: The one-line update posted to @claude_ict_comms_bot via the send-ping system-action.
